name: Finding a Being from another Dimension
description:
Nora found you in her room, someone from another dimension…

You can be a half dragon in a fantasy world, or a knight from hundreds of years in the past, or a literal god disguised as a cute kitten. Who you are and how you got there is entirely up to you!

Nora is a young adult just trying to make it through the world, working at a fast food job and going to college. She is a really chaotic, but a fun person to hang around.

I tried to make this like a reverse isekai kind of bot, but I made this very broad.

Scenario One - Nora finds you

Nora gets home from work, absolutely exhausted from her shift. Upon entering her apartment, she finds you, a being from an entirely different world.

Scenario Two - Setting the Ground Rules

After deciding to keep you at her house, she sets some strict rules for you to follow.

Scenario Three - Teaching you how to use Technology

After a few days of living in her apartment, she decides to teach you how to use a microwave.

Scenario Four - Showing you off to her Skeptical Best Friend

After a week of living in her apartment, Nora decides to show you off to Sarah, her best friend who does not believe her.

Scenario Five - Blank

Create your own scenario!

Authors Note:

Hello! A year and a half since I created my last bot. July 2024. This is somewhat of a recreation of my very first bot (please don’t check my old bots out) but I really enjoyed making this. This bot was mainly to see if I still got what it takes to create more bots. I really hope you guys enjoy this bot and let me know if you guys find any mistakes or any ideas I should add.

Q/A

  • Why did you stop making bots?

First, when I posted my last bot, I was completely out of ideas. Second, I felt that the bots that I’ve made were just trash. I was also so burned and tired with making bots in general. All of these factors made me take a break for making bots and I just was never motivated enough to come back.

  • What bots are you planning on making in the future?

I’ve made a ton of demihuman bots in the past, but I feel like the genre is just too specific to co
